briefing: Markets were neutral today with NASDAQ +0.9% and S&P 500 +0.4% — no strong risk-on or risk-off signal. With $777 in cash and 4 open slots, we deployed into SEZL, the highest-scoring candidate with full multi-signal confirmation, while continuing to hold existing positions through the quiet session.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When multiple technical indicators — like RSI, MACD, price vs. moving average, and volume — all point the same direction at once, it's a stronger signal than any single indicator alone. Traders use this 'confirmation' to filter out noise and avoid acting on a single false signal.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當多個技術指標——例如RSI、MACD、股價與均線的關係,以及成交量——同時指向同一方向時,這比單一指標更具參考價值。交易者利用這種「訊號確認」來過濾雜訊,避免因單一錯誤訊號而做出錯誤決策。

market_education.summary_en: Broad indices posted modest gains today, with the NASDAQ slightly outpacing the S&P 500, reflecting a generally calm, low-conviction trading session rather than any major catalyst-driven move. Momentum names with strong technical setups, like several in today's screener, continued attracting volume even as the broader tape stayed range-bound. Without a clear risk-on or risk-off trigger, most of the day's price action reflected stock-specific technical strength rather than macro news.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢溫和,那斯達克指數漲幅略高於標普500指數,反映市場整體處於平靜、觀望氣氛,並未出現重大消息面催化劑。部分具備強勁技術面訊號的動能股,即使大盤呈區間震盪,仍持續吸引資金流入。在缺乏明確風險偏好或避險訊號的情況下,今日多數股價表現主要來自個股技術面強度,而非總體經濟消息。

trades.reasoning: Top-scoring candidate (100) with full signal confirmation — RSI 65.9 in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — justifying deployment of available cash into an open slot per risk rules even on a neutral-breadth day.
